falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern assumed controlled volatility; sustained fear invalidates the stabilization thesis and suggests a deeper liquidation phase than modeled

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts by >15bps from current level
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The pattern matched a soft-landing bottom; renewed curve inversion signals recession acceleration, breaking the macro premise of the 79% similarity match

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This breaches the August 2024 structural low; the pattern match fails if price violates the reference bottom's hard floor, proving it was not the analogous floor

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
